ops.title: M2 STT app-auth is deferred (not won't-fix): the upstream OpenAI STT key resolution (hermes-agent tools/transcription_tools.py:1753 _resolve_openai_audio_client_config) prefers stt.openai.api_key (a config literal -> public git) over VOICE_TOOLS_OPENAI_KEY/OPENAI_API_KEY env, so a secret STT bearer can only reach hermes via env, which requires regenerating the encrypted sops bundle with a NEW secret value (a bootstrap/secret-collection step, not a dev-box edit). omlx is third-party with no API-key flag. The delivered M2 mitigation is binding both services to the tailnet IP (commit b11aaf7); pf + tailnet ACL remain the primary gate.
